contract: nu03 seesaw with carrier-forced Yukawa normalisation
firewall: theory contract, never a scorecard row, never load-bearing; frozen record untouched; FLAV.NUSCALE.01 stays open

checks.check: C1 CARRIER NORMALISATION [P named]: one SO(10) 16 per family + minimal Yukawa sector (10_H / PS (1,2,2)) => y_nu = y_t at the PS scale -- the (y_nu, M_R) trade-off of FLAV.NUSCALE.01 collapses to M_R alone
checks.detail: y_t(c3^3 Mbar = 1.534e+14 GeV) = 0.438 (1-loop); premise [P]: minimal Yukawa sector, named not proven

checks.check: C2 INVERSION INSIDE THE COMPILER WINDOW [E-num]: the observed m_3 = 0.0503 eV demands M_R INSIDE the PS two-step window [M_PS, M_GUT] (v249) -- the carrier UV window brackets the measured absolute scale

C3 INTEGER RUNG HONESTY GATE [O]: M_R = c3^3 Mbar predicts m_3 LOW by 20-45% at 1-loop -- NEAR the rung (3.1 vs 3.0) but NOT ON it; per v354/v355 the ladder pin is DECLINED; decision computation named: 2-loop SM + explicit PS threshold matching
checks.detail: m_3(c3^3 Mbar) = 0.0301 eV vs observed 0.0503 eV (ratio 0.60); RG-down factor = 0.794; rung required 3.154 vs integer 3

checks.check: C4 FALSIFIABLE BAND [E-num]: over the PS window the carrier-normalised seesaw spans m_3 in [low, high] bracketing 0.0503 eV; the LOW-M_R half is already in tension with DESI Sigma m_nu -- cosmology cuts the window from below
checks.detail: m_3(M_GUT) = 0.0018 eV, m_3(M_PS) = 0.1151 eV; NO floor Sigma = 0.0589 eV; Sigma at M_PS end = 0.124 eV vs DESI ~0.072

checks.check: C5 CONTEXT (recorded, NOT claimed): required M_R vs compiler scales -- ratios logged for the decision computation; no pattern claimed (v354/v355)

reading: With the carrier-forced normalisation y_nu = y_t (one 16 per family + minimal Yukawa sector, [P]), FLAV.NUSCALE.01's two-parameter (y_nu, M_R) trade-off collapses to M_R alone, and the observed m_3 = 0.0503 eV demands M_R inside the compiler's own PS window, at log_c3(Mbar/M_R) ~ 3.1 (the y_nu = 1 inversion gave the structureless 2.57). The integer rung c3^3 Mbar predicts m_3 20-45% low at 1-loop: NEAR, not ON -- the ladder pin is DECLINED per the anti-numerology discipline, and the decision computation (2-loop SM + explicit PS thresholds) is named. What survives regardless: the absolute scale is now a ONE-parameter statement bracketed by the compiler window, with the NO floor Sigma m_nu = 0.059 eV as the falsifiable edge. No gate closed, frozen record untouched.
